name: Niraku GC Holdings, Inc.
summary: Niraku GC Holdings, Inc., an investment holding company, operates pachinko and pachislot halls in Japan. It also operates hotels; a Spanish restaurant franchise under the LIZARRAN brand; and a food mall under the YOKOCHO brand. In addition, the company engages in the property investment and cleaning service businesses. Further, it operates amusement centre operations; and wholesales computer games, and sporting and other recreational goods. The company was formerly known as Niraku Global Community Holdings Inc. and changed its name to Niraku GC Holdings, Inc. Niraku GC Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Koriyama, Japan.
